calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Martin Glickfeld, Esq. appeared for plaintiff David Asulin, dba Mr. Build Construction.
No appearance by defendants Paul Lei (default entered 2/16/07), John Lau (default entered 8/22/06), Dicksen Engineers (default entered 8/22/06), Astrom Roofing Corporation (default entered 9/7/06), Juan Sandoval (default entered 8/22/06) or Pacific Welding (default entered 8/22/06).
Order granting plaintiff's request for waiver of witness appearance at default prove-up hearing filed 4/14/08.
Doe defendants dismissed today, April 17, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff David Asulin, dba Mr. Build Construction, and against the Defaulted Defendants Paul Lei, John Lau, Dicksen Engineers, Astrom Roofing Corporation, Juan Sandoval and Pacific Welding, jointly and severally, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $210,680.00.
Post Judgment Interest - At a rate of ten percent (10%) per annum in an amount to be determined.
Costs - In an amount to be determined.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
